description_long: This is a large, modern sectional chaise with a left-facing extended lounge and a long, continuous seating area. The upholstery is a light gray fabric, complemented by a series of darker gray accent cushions that run along the backrest. The backrest is segmented into multiple angled sections, providing ergonomic support and a contemporary aesthetic. The chaise features slim, black metal legs that elevate the structure and add a minimalist touch. The armrests are present on both ends, with the left side being more pronounced and integrated into the lounge extension. The overall design is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, light gray sectional chaise with dark accent cushions, segmented backrest, and slim black metal legs. Features a left-facing lounge extension and armrests on both ends.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full length, left-facing lounge, and arrangement of cushions along the segmented backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lounge extension and the thickness of the armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented backrest and the alignment of the cushions, as well as the slim supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the end of the chaise, with a clear view of the cushion arrangement.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is segmented into multiple angled sections, each with a slight curve for ergonomic support. It is tall and slightly reclined, with no visible tufting or decorative elements, giving it a clean, modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both ends; the left armrest is integrated into the lounge extension and is more pronounced, while the right armrest is shorter and more compact.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and made of black metal, providing a minimalist and modern appearance. They are evenly spaced and slightly inset from the edges, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are seven loose, dark gray cushions evenly spaced along the backrest, providing both comfort and visual contrast. The cushions are rectangular and appear to be of similar size, arranged in a single row.
